messages.content: What are the leave rules for teaching staff?

{"intent": "leave_rules", "title": "Leave Rules for Teaching Staff", "subtitle": null, "sections": [{"heading": "General Leave Entitlement", "type": "paragraph", "content": "Faculty members are entitled to leave as prescribed in the Employee Resource Book (ERB) [2]. The ERB is incorporated by reference into the Faculty Employment Agreement [2]."}, {"heading": "Types of Leave Available", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Annual Leave: Entitlement as approved [5]", "Academic Leave (Conference/FDP): As approved [5]", "Sabbatical Leave: 6-12 months (after 7 years) [5]", "Leave Without Pay (LWP): As sanctioned, granted only in exceptional circumstances and impacts gratuity/provident fund calculations proportionately [4]. Continuous LWP exceeding 30 days without prior sanction may result in termination of service [4]. Medical emergencies can potentially be converted to Medical Leave if unused balance is available with doctor's certification [4]", "Special Leave (Marriage/Bereavement): 3-5 days [5]", "Maternity Leave: 26 weeks [5]", "Paternity Leave: 15 days [5]"]}, {"heading": "Attendance Requirements", "type": "paragraph", "content": "All faculty must mark attendance through the biometric system [3]. Minimum attendance is 90% per semester [3]. Arrival after 9:30 AM is marked as half-day absent unless prior approval is obtained [3]. Leaving before 4:30 PM without approval is also marked as a half-day absent [3]."}, {"heading": "Class Cancellation", "type": "paragraph", "content": "Classes must not be cancelled without the prior written approval of the Department Head [1]. In case of unavoidable cancellation, a makeup class must be arranged within the same week [1]."}], "footer": "Sources: NMIMS Employee Resource Book 2024-25, NMIMS Faculty Applications Compendium, NMIMS Faculty Employment Agreement Legal", "confidence": "high", "fallback": null}
